observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with adhesive contamination
Visual pattern suggesting glue residue on surface
Localized deviation from normal leather appearance
mechanism_explanation: Excess adhesive from a previous process step remains on the surface.
severity_visual_description: minor glue residue on surface visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Clean adhesive dispensing nozzles and add wipe station.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the glue residue on surface would be absent and surface appears normal.
